summary: Frontend testing of Display Layout preview enhancements and Navigation view UI positioning. All features verified working correctly - Compass Rose and Next Stop mockup elements now appear in NavPreview, idle compass is tied to showCompassRose toggle, and Navigation view UI elements render within screen bounds.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Display tab preview shows Compass Rose element (data-testid='preview-compass-rose') in In Route mode
VERIFIED: Display tab preview shows Next Stop element (data-testid='preview-next-stop') in In Route mode
VERIFIED: Idle mode compass in preview is tied to showCompassRose toggle - hidden when toggled off
VERIFIED: Toggle showCompassRose off hides compass in both Idle and In Route preview modes
VERIFIED: Toggle showNextStop off hides Next Stop in In Route preview mode
VERIFIED: All 20 HUD elements still show as 20/20 visible count
VERIFIED: Scale buttons (XS/S/M/L/XL) functional for all resizable elements
VERIFIED: Navigation view loads with UI elements within screen bounds
VERIFIED: Map controls render properly on right edge (x=1853, within 1920px width)
VERIFIED: Weather panel renders within screen bounds (x=264, y=439)
VERIFIED: Compass Rose renders in Navigation view (data-testid='compass-rose-container') at x=1756, y=864
VERIFIED: Search bar visible at top center (x=844, y=19)
VERIFIED: Location indicator (IOWA) visible at bottom center

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: Display Layout preview enhancements verified. Key points: 1) NavPreview.tsx now includes Compass Rose (data-testid='preview-compass-rose') and Next Stop (data-testid='preview-next-stop') mockup elements in In Route mode. 2) Idle mode compass visibility is tied to showCompassRose toggle. 3) Navigation view UI elements (compass, weather panel, map controls) all render within screen bounds. 4) Scale transforms applied to maneuverPreview, fuelCost, hosStatus, routeComparison, and weatherPanel elements. Test flow: Guest Login -> Display (sidebar) -> Verify preview elements -> Test toggles -> Navigation (sidebar) -> Verify UI positioning.

compass_rose_in_preview.details: data-testid='preview-compass-rose' found in In Route preview mode, hidden when showCompassRose toggled off

next_stop_in_preview.details: data-testid='preview-next-stop' found in In Route preview mode, hidden when showNextStop toggled off

idle_mode_compass_toggle.details: Idle mode compass visibility tied to showCompassRose toggle - compass hidden when toggle is off

visible_count.details: 20/20 visible elements when all toggles on, 19/20 when one element toggled off

scale_buttons.details: XS/S/M/L/XL scale buttons functional for resizable elements

navigation_view_compass.details: Compass Rose container found in Navigation view at x=1756, y=864 (within screen bounds)

navigation_view_weather_panel.details: Weather panel renders at x=264, y=439 (within screen bounds)

navigation_view_map_controls.details: Map controls render at x=1853 on right edge (within 1920px screen width)

navigation_view_search_bar.details: Search bar visible at top center (x=844, y=19)

navigation_view_location_indicator.details: Location indicator (IOWA) visible at bottom center
